200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the unit takes extra shots at 2 nearby enemies. The shots deal the unit’s attack damage and extra 10000 physical damage. The shots are fired once every 0,5 sec for a total of 5 sec. All enemies hit have their physical armor reduced by 15% for 1 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the unit takes extra shots at 4 nearby enemies. The shots deal the unit’s attack damage and extra 18000 physical damage. The shots are fired once every 0,5 sec for a total of 5 sec. All enemies hit have their physical armor reduced by 25% for 1 sec. Also, those enemies are knocked off balance and become unable to deal critical damage or dodge attacks for 1 sec. Once in a while, shoots huge bolts at 3 random enemies, one bolt per each enemy fighter class. The bolts deal damage to and stun enemies. The damage and stun duration depend on the class of the fighter the bolt hits. -Tanks take 90000 physical damage and are stunned for 1 sec. -Archers take 30000 physical damage and are stunned for 3 sec. -Mages take 60000 physical damage and are stunned for 2 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the unit takes extra shots at 4 nearby enemies. The shots deal the unit’s attack damage and extra 25000 physical damage. The shots are fired once every 0,5 sec for a total of 5 sec. All enemies hit have their physical armor reduced by 40% for 1 sec. Also, those enemies are knocked off balance and become unable to deal critical damage or dodge attacks for 1 sec. Once in a while, shoots huge bolts at 3 random enemies, one bolt per each enemy fighter class. The bolts deal damage to and stun enemies. The damage and stun duration depend on the class of the fighter the bolt hits. -Tanks take 120000 physical damage and are stunned for 1,5 sec. -Archers take 80000 physical damage and are stunned for 3,5 sec. -Mages take 100000 physical damage and are stunned for 2,5 sec. On shooting every 3 bolts, a poisoned bolt is shot. It poisons all enemies hits, dealing 200000 damage over 5 sec. All damage taken is reduced by 50% for 5 sec. Once in a while, the fighter summons a dragon that sets enemies on fire, dealing 75000 pure damage to them instantly and 100000 pure damage over 5 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Each additional shot has a 10% chance to deal an additional 10000 physical damage.

description 4/6

Each additional shot has a 10% chance to deal an additional 10000 physical damage. Dragonborn’s bolts deal additional physical damage equal to 120% of Dragonborn’s attack.

description 6/6

Each additional shot has a 10% chance to deal an additional 10000 physical damage. Dragonborn’s bolts deal additional physical damage equal to 120% of Dragonborn’s attack. When the dragon deals damage to enemies, they have a 25% to turn stone for 2 sec. They can’t move and take 25% more damage.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When Dragonborn starts making additional shots, they gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 400% of Dragonborn’s damage. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for up to 5 sec.

description 4/6

When Dragonborn starts making additional shots, they gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 400% of Dragonborn’s damage. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for up to 5 sec. For each enemy hit by the bolt, Dragonborn’s physical armor is increased by 25% for 5 sec. Up to 3 effects.

description 6/6

When Dragonborn starts making additional shots, they gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 400% of Dragonborn’s damage. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for up to 5 sec. For each enemy hit by the bolt, Dragonborn’s physical armor is increased by 25% for 5 sec. Up to 3 effects. Dragon restores 100000 health of all allies immediately and 400000 health over 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

All units hit by additional shots also have their damage reduced by 15% for 5 sec.

description 4/6

All units hit by additional shots also have their damage reduced by 15% for 5 sec. All units hit by additional shots also have their damage reduced by 15% for 5 sec. Depending on the class, bolts also have an additional effect : - Tanks – Reduce physical armor by 25% for 4 sec. - Archers – Reduce damage by 25% for 4 sec. - Mages – Reduce spell power by 25% for 4 sec.

description 6/6

All units hit by additional shots also have their damage reduced by 15% for 5 sec. Depending on the class, bolts also have an additional effect : - Tanks – Reduce physical armor by 25% for 4 sec. - Archers – Reduce damage by 25% for 4 sec. - Mages – Reduce spell power by 25% for 4 sec. Dragon reduces physical and magic armor of all affected enemies by 15% for 7 sec.

Materials

Predator Eye
Dragon Horn
